Vishnu1000
Sadhana Seva Support
We believe spiritual companion apps should be completely private and free from commercial distractions. Vishnu1000 does not harvest your personal data, serves zero ads, and remains 100% free to download. If this app adds value to your daily practice, please consider supporting the seva to cover hosting, maintenance, and the recording of future Sahasranamas (like Shiva, Durga, and Lalitha Sahasranama).
Securely pay via UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, Amazon Pay), Netbanking, Wallets, or Cards.
🙏

Namaste & Thank You

Thank you for supporting the Vishnu1000 Sadhana Seva! Your support directly funds our ad-free hosting and the creation of future chanting companions (Shiva, Durga, and Lalitha Sahasranama).
